TEST BLOCKED: Result: The sign-in attempt with email 'member@atelier.test' and incorrect password 'wrong-password-123' produced an inline error on the login page. Observations from the page and screenshot:
- The inline error text 'Invalid email or password.' is visible under the password field.
- The sign-in form remains visible on /login (no navigation to a logged-in view), indicating the user was not signed in.
These observations directly satisfy the test requirement that submitting a known email with an incorrect password shows an inline error and does not sign the user in.
